title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Roadmap Planning — 5 Skills for Quarterly Planning and Priority Alignment
description: For product managers and heads of engineering, this pack builds opportunity sizing summaries, prioritization scoring matrices, now-next-later roadmap narratives, dependency mapping notes, and board-level roadmap presentations so they can move from chaotic feature lists to a defensible, stakeholder-approved plan
gumroad_description:
A chaotic feature list is not a roadmap. This pack turns it into one.

Who this is for:
— Product managers who present roadmaps that get re-litigated every quarter
— Heads of engineering managing stakeholder expectations across multiple teams
— PMs who need to defend prioritization decisions with more than gut feel

What's inside:
— Skill 1: Opportunity sizing summary builder
— Skill 2: Prioritization scoring matrix generator
— Skill 3: Now-next-later narrative drafter
— Skill 4: Dependency mapper and risk annotator
— Skill 5: Board-level roadmap presentation writer
— Installation guide + quick-reference trigger table

A defensible plan stakeholders actually align on. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
